name: Tata Steel
movement: Capacity expansion at Kalinganagar Phase II ramping toward 8 MTPA.
rawmat: Captive iron ore and coal hedge input volatility; long met-coal contracts.
supply: Vendor base localisation push; supplier development for MRO and refractories.
tech: Investing in pellet plant and CCUS pilots; digital procurement on Ariba.
implication: Aggressive domestic capacity intensifies competition for ore, coal and alloys — expect tighter input availability in eastern India.

name: JSW Steel
movement: Vijayanagar expansion to 24 MTPA; bidding for raw material assets.
rawmat: Heavy seaborne ore/coal buyer; pursuing overseas coking coal mines.
supply: Scaling scrap-based EAF capacity; aggressive logistics contracting.
tech: Green steel roadmap; hydrogen pilots; advanced spend analytics.
implication: JSW's seaborne buying scale moves freight and met-coal markets — monitor their cargo timing for freight rate signals.

name: SAIL
movement: Brownfield modernisation across integrated plants; ~35 MTPA target.
rawmat: Captive ore advantage; coal import dependence remains a cost exposure.
supply: Large PSU tender pipeline; e-procurement and reverse auction expansion.
tech: Energy efficiency and emission reduction capex; legacy asset upgrades.
implication: SAIL tender activity sets benchmark pricing for capital and MRO categories in India.

name: Jindal Steel & Power
movement: Angul expansion; world's largest blast furnace plans; rail capacity.
rawmat: Coal gasification DRI route reduces coking coal dependence.
supply: Vertical integration in mining and power; selective import sourcing.
tech: Coal-gasification and hydrogen-blend trials; plate mill upgrades.
implication: Their gasification route is a strategic hedge against coking coal — a model worth tracking for input diversification.

name: ArcelorMittal
movement: Global decarbonisation capex; DRI-EAF transitions in EU and North America.
rawmat: Captive mines in Canada/Liberia; high-grade ore prioritisation.
supply: Global supplier consolidation; strong commodity hedging desk.
tech: Hydrogen DRI at scale; XCarb green steel brand; digital S2P.
implication: Parent-group decarbonisation playbook signals the high-grade ore + green power direction AMNS input sourcing will follow.

name: POSCO
movement: HyREX hydrogen-reduction pilots; lithium/battery materials diversification.
rawmat: Long-term ore/coal contracts; investing in upstream lithium and nickel.
supply: Diversifying beyond steel into battery materials supply chains.
tech: Industry-leading hydrogen reduction R&D; smart factory procurement.
implication: POSCO's HyREX progress is the benchmark for hydrogen steelmaking input requirements over the next decade.

name: Nucor
movement: EAF capacity additions; downstream product diversification.
rawmat: Scrap- and DRI-based; owns DRI plants and scrap processing.
supply: Vertically integrated scrap supply; agile mini-mill model.
tech: Low-carbon EAF leadership; flexible, scrap-flexible operations.
implication: Nucor's scrap-DRI model demonstrates the charge-mix flexibility that hedges raw material cost — relevant to EAF strategy.
